Short Description: Shogun X Revolving Sushi is planning a soft opening at the former Hooters location in Manchester, pending final town approvals. The restaurant will feature a conveyor belt sushi system serving sushi, sashimi, and Japanese favorites. An official grand opening date has not yet been announced.

Mozz & Co., an upscale Italian delicatessen, will open on April 8th at the former Toro Mexican Street Food space in West Hartford. The menu includes chicken cutlets, porchetta, house-made meats, salads, desserts, and espresso, with Italian dinner service on weekends. The business is operated by chef Joey Cusano, formerly of Le Mazet.

Status: set opening date at Brass Mill Center
Short Description: Cinnabon will open at Brass Mill Center's second-level food court on March 31st at 12:00pm, marking the brand's return to the mall after operating there until early 2025. The bakery specializes in cinnamon rolls, coffees, Chillattas, and desserts.

Location or Full Address with zip code: Brass Mill Center, 495 Union Street, Waterbury, CT
Status: set opening date at Brass Mill Center
Short Description: Auntie Anne's Pretzels will open alongside Cinnabon in a shared space at Brass Mill Center's food court on March 31st at 12:00pm. The chain serves soft-baked pretzels, pretzel dogs, and lemonades, and represents a new tenant for the mall.

Status: coming soon; "look for them to open this summer"
Short Description: Deep 6 Arcade is coming soon to the former Olde Dog Tavern space at 2505 Main Street in Stratford, directly across from the Stratford Train Station. The venue will feature classic restored arcade games, live music, a restaurant and bar, and private event rooms.

Status: scheduled to open in late spring 2026
Short Description: Thena Pita Bar will occupy the former Pizzeria da Vinci space at 25 Falls Road in Moodus, offering authentic Greek street food including gyros, souvlaki, and baklava. The restaurant will be owned by Niko Papathanasiou and Sarah Turker, operators of the "Greekin' Out" food truck since 2015.

Zach's Chicken & Grill has opened at 13 West Main Street in downtown Rockville, occupying the former Craig's Kitchen location. The restaurant specializes in fresh fried chicken, tenders, wings, sandwiches, and combo meals, open daily from 10am.

Location or Full Address with zip code: 657 Silas Deane Highway, Wethersfield, CT (former Rite Aid)
Short Description: Neil's Donuts will not be opening at the former Rite Aid location on 657 Silas Deane Highway, as the owner cited expensive traffic studies required for drive-thru approval. The owner stated he is still actively looking at other sites in Wethersfield and surrounding areas.

Location or Full Address with zip code: 167 Waterford Parkway North, Waterford, CT (former Bob's Stores/EMS, Cross Roads Centre)
Short Description: Hobby Lobby is opening at 167 Waterford Parkway North in Waterford, taking the former Bob's Stores/EMS space at Cross Roads Centre. No opening timeline has been announced.

Location or Full Address with zip code: Waterford Commons, Waterford, CT (former Party City location)
Short Description: Boot Barn, a Western-wear retailer, will occupy the former Party City location at Waterford Commons, offering clothing, cowboy/girl boots, work boots, and accessories. The store is planned to open in Fall 2026.

Status: target opening in fall pending local approvals
Short Description: 7 Brew Coffee plans to open a drive-thru location at 731 Long Hill Road in Groton, next to O'Reilly Auto Parts. This will be their first Southeast Connecticut location, with a fall opening target pending local approvals.

Location or Full Address with zip code: 117 Boston Post Road, Waterford, CT (former Papa Gino's/D'Angelo's)
Short Description: Dave's Hot Chicken, a Nashville-style chicken restaurant, is coming to 117 Boston Post Road in Waterford, taking over the former Papa Gino's/D'Angelo's space. No opening date or timeline was provided.

Restaurant Depot received approval for a new approximately 47,000 sq ft warehouse store at 161 Waterford Parkway North in Waterford. The store will serve restaurants and business owners. No opening date was specified.

Shah's Halal Food will open at 974 Poquonnock Road in Groton, offering gyros, platters, falafel, burgers, wings, salads, hummus, pita, and baklava. No specific opening date was provided in this article.

Playa Bowls, a smoothie and acai bowl chain, has signed a lease at Springfield Crossing at 1655 Boston Post Road. The chain offers fresh fruit smoothies, juices, bowls, and coffee. No opening date was specified.
Beyond Oishii Sushi has signed a lease for 1,625 square feet at Springfield Crossing, planning to serve sushi, sashimi, and traditional Japanese cuisine. No opening date was specified.
Be Young Wellness Spa has signed a lease for 3,250 square feet at Springfield Crossing, focused on luxury wellness services and spa treatments. No opening date was specified.

Status: closing on May 2nd; moving sale in progress
Short Description: Barnes & Noble's Farmington location is holding a moving sale with books at 40% off, gifts and games at 50% off, and the cafe still open. The store will close on May 2nd as it prepares to relocate to Westfarms mall.

Status: reopen in July inside the mall
Short Description: Barnes & Noble will reopen inside Westfarms mall in July 2026 after closing its current South East Road location on May 2nd. No further details on the new space were provided.

Status: set to become new flagship location
Short Description: Hannoush Jewelers will take over Barnes & Noble's current space at 1599 South East Road as a new flagship location, sharing the space with Goldfish Swim School and KidStrong. No opening date was specified.

Status: set to open in former Barnes & Noble space
Short Description: Goldfish Swim School will open at the former Barnes & Noble space at 1599 South East Road alongside Hannoush Jewelers and KidStrong. No opening date was specified.

Status: set to open in former Barnes & Noble space
Short Description: KidStrong will open at the former Barnes & Noble space at 1599 South East Road alongside Hannoush Jewelers and Goldfish Swim School. No opening date was specified.

Five Guys is under construction at 755 Silver Lane in East Hartford, taking 2,244 sq ft of a new multi-tenant building on the former Friendly's site. It will feature a small front patio and is expected to open later in 2026.

Wingstop is under construction at 755 Silver Lane in East Hartford, taking 1,617 sq ft of a new multi-tenant building on the former Friendly's site. Both Wingstop and Five Guys are expected to open later in 2026.

Shah's Halal Food is opening at 974 Poquonnock Road in Groton, with building permits recently issued to convert the space into a halal eatery. The menu includes gyros, platters, falafel, burgers, wings, salads, hummus, pita, and baklava.

Location or Full Address with zip code: 149 Main Street, Rockfall section, Middlefield, CT
Short Description: Hot Rock Pizza is coming soon to 149 Main Street in Middlefield's Rockfall section, taking over the former Pizzeria Da Vinci space. The restaurant will feature hearth-cooked pizzas on black granite slabs, hot sandwiches, salads, and crispy wings, with limited indoor and seasonal outdoor seating.
